display.purpose: Brand name in header only. Never used for content.

body.purpose: Default text for buttons, inputs, comments, descriptions, menu rows.

label.purpose: Section headings, meta labels, uppercase tracking text.

motion.name: ease-interactive
motion.purpose: Default transition duration for all interactive states.

motion.name: ease-panel
motion.purpose: Slide-in/out duration for hamburger menu panel.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action: submit, save, confirm. Blue filled, soft corners.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #2563eb; color: #fff; padding: 10px 16px; border-radius: 12px; font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #1d4ed8; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: default; }

components.name: Destructive Button
components.css: .ds-btn-destructive { background: #dc2626; color: #fff; padding: 10px 16px; border-radius: 12px; font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms; } .ds-btn-destructive:hover { background: #b91c1c; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard text input on dark surface.
components.css: .ds-input-text { background: #09090b; color: #fff; padding: 10px 12px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #27272a; font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms; width: 100%; } .ds-input-text:focus { border-color: #3b82f6; } .ds-input-text::placeholder { color: #71717a; }

components.name: Video Card
components.description: Primary video display card — 65vh tall, dark surface, rounded.
components.css: .ds-card-video { height: 65vh; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 12px; background: #18181b; position: relative; }

components.name: Menu Row
components.css: .ds-menu-row { display: flex; width: 100%; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 14px 16px; font-size: 14px; color: #d4d4d8; background: none; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms; font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-menu-row:hover { background: #27272a; } .ds-menu-row svg { flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Bottom Nav Item
components.description: Bottom navigation tab — icon + label, active/inactive states.
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 2px; padding: 4px 16px; font-size: 12px; color: #71717a; background: none; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: color 150ms; font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-nav-item:hover { color: #d4d4d8; } .ds-nav-item-active { color: #ffffff; }

narrative.overview:
Dumpstack lives in darkness — black backgrounds, zinc-toned surfaces, content that commands the full stage. Every design decision serves one goal: get out of the way of the video. Chrome is thin, borders are quiet, hierarchy is flat-on-purpose. This is not "dark mode" — it is dark by nature, dark as identity.

The system explicitly rejects generic AI app aesthetics: no purple gradients, no glassmorphism, no identical card grids, no SaaS clichés. It takes cues from underground culture — raw, unfiltered, energetic. The interface feels like a back-alley venue, not a corporate lobby.
keyCharacteristics: Content-first: video fills 65% of the viewport; UI chrome occupies the remaining edges
Dark-grounded: pure black body (#000000), subtle zinc layers for depth
Singular accent: blue (#3b82f6) is the only action color — used for CTAs, active states, and focus indicators
Flat-by-default: no shadows except on the slide-out panel (shadow-xl); depth is conveyed through tonal layering
Mobile-native: max-w-sm (384px) content width centered on all screens

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Blue is the only action color on the page.

rules.name: The Dark Canvas Rule
rules.body: The body is always #000000. Surfaces stack upward from black through zinc-950 to zinc-900.

rules.name: The Single Family Rule
rules.body: Geist Sans carries everything. No serif, no second sans.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. No card shadows, no lifted buttons.

dos: Do use black (#000000) as the body background everywhere — no exceptions.
Do use zinc-900 for surface/card backgrounds. It's the primary surface color.
Do use blue-600 for primary actions — one accent, used consistently.
Do use border-zinc-800 as the default separator. It's subtle and consistent.
Do keep content width constrained to max-w-sm (384px) centered in the viewport.
Do use transition-colors for all interactive states — simple, performant, sufficient.
Do use tonal layering (black → zinc-950 → zinc-900) instead of shadows for depth.
Do truncate button labels to one line. No wrapped CTA text.
Do keep the video as the hero — 65vh container, minimal chrome around it.
Do use Geist exclusively. One family, variable weight for hierarchy.
donts: Don't use purple gradients, glassmorphism, or neon accents. This is not a generic AI app.
Don't use bg-zinc-900 as page background. The body is always black.
Don't add shadows to cards, buttons, or surfaces. The only exception is the hamburger panel (shadow-xl).
Don't use multiple accent colors. Blue is the only action color.
Don't use three identical cards in a row. Vary card layouts or skip cards entirely.
Don't put em-dashes (—) anywhere in visible text. Use a hyphen (-).
Don't use emoji as icons. Use inline SVG icons.
Don't use h-screen — use min-h-[100dvh] for mobile viewport stability.
Don't mix surface colors. Page = black, card = zinc-900, elevated = zinc-900 + border.
Don't animate layout properties. Animate only transform and opacity.
